// Filter for windows-composition's bindings.rs (Windows.UI.Composition).
// Generated by tool_composition into crates/libs/composition/src/bindings.rs.
// Prune or extend the safe surface by editing this file, then re-run
// cargo run -p tool_composition.
//
// This crate wraps the SYSTEM composition stack (Windows.UI.Composition), which
// — unlike the lifted Microsoft.UI.Composition — can host a visual tree directly
// in an HWND via ICompositorDesktopInterop::CreateDesktopWindowTarget, with no
// WinUI / Windows App SDK dependency. (Lifted composition has no standalone HWND
// target; that path lives in windows-reactor instead.)

Windows.UI.Composition.Compositor
Windows.UI.Composition.Compositor::CreateInstance
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositor::{CreateContainerVisual, CreateSpriteVisual, CreateColorBrushWithColor, CreateScopedBatch, CreateVector3KeyFrameAnimation}
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositor2::{CreateNineGridBrush}
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositor5::{CreateShapeVisual, CreateSpriteShapeWithGeometry, CreateContainerShape, CreateEllipseGeometry}

Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionObject
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionObject::{get_Compositor, StartAnimation}

// A dispatcher queue must exist on the thread before the compositor is created.
// The current-thread factory (CreateDispatcherQueueController) is not in this
// repo's Win32 metadata, so stack.rs declares it directly; we only need the type.
Windows.System.DispatcherQueueController

Windows.UI.Composition.Visual
Windows.UI.Composition.IVisual::{put_Offset, get_Offset, put_Size, get_Size, put_Opacity, get_Opacity, put_IsVisible, get_IsVisible, put_AnchorPoint, put_CenterPoint, put_Scale, put_BorderMode, get_Parent}
Windows.UI.Composition.IVisual2::{put_RelativeSizeAdjustment, put_RelativeOffsetAdjustment, put_ParentForTransform}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionBorderMode

Windows.UI.Composition.ContainerVisual
Windows.UI.Composition.IContainerVisual::{get_Children}

Windows.UI.Composition.VisualCollection
Windows.UI.Composition.IVisualCollection::{get_Count, InsertAtTop, InsertAtBottom, Remove, RemoveAll}

Windows.UI.Composition.SpriteVisual
Windows.UI.Composition.ISpriteVisual::{put_Brush}

Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionBrush
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionColorBrush
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionColorBrush::{put_Color, get_Color}

// Nine-grid brush: a stretchable border used for the tile-selection highlight.
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionNineGridBrush
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionNineGridBrush::{SetInsetsWithValues, put_IsCenterHollow, put_Source}

// Shapes: composition-drawn geometry used to render the neighbor-count dots.
Windows.UI.Composition.ShapeVisual
Windows.UI.Composition.IShapeVisual::{get_Shapes}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionShape
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionShapeCollection
Windows.Foundation.Collections.IVector::{Append}
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionShape::{put_Offset}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionSpriteShape
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionSpriteShape::{put_FillBrush}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionContainerShape
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionContainerShape::{get_Shapes}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionGeometry
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionEllipseGeometry
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionEllipseGeometry::{put_Radius}

// Animations: the "reveal" scale bounce played across the mines on game over.
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionAnimation
Windows.UI.Composition.KeyFrameAnimation
Windows.UI.Composition.IKeyFrameAnimation::{put_Duration, put_DelayTime, put_IterationBehavior, put_IterationCount}
Windows.UI.Composition.Vector3KeyFrameAnimation
Windows.UI.Composition.IVector3KeyFrameAnimation::{InsertKeyFrame}
Windows.UI.Composition.AnimationIterationBehavior

// Scoped batch: groups the mine animations so completion could be observed.
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionScopedBatch
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionScopedBatch::{End}
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionBatchTypes

Windows.Foundation.TimeSpan

// Standalone HWND hosting: the desktop target and its root visual.
Windows.UI.Composition.CompositionTarget
Windows.UI.Composition.ICompositionTarget::{put_Root, get_Root}
Windows.UI.Composition.Desktop.DesktopWindowTarget
Windows.Win32.ICompositorDesktopInterop::{CreateDesktopWindowTarget}

Windows.UI.Color
